description: Rising senior over the summer — the critical pre-application phase. Tests the only summer template that exists.
business_rationale: Covers the highest-stakes window in the user journey: the summer before senior year, when students must start essays, line up rec letters, and finalize their list. This is the only summer-specific roadmap in the system — if it breaks, the most engaged users lose guidance at the worst possible moment.
tests: Resolver picks junior_summer (the only summer template that exists)
Pre-application phase template emphasizes essay starts and rec-letter outreach
